no-wikipedia:Via Tragara.notes: Via Tragara is a scenic pedestrian promenade in Capri ending at the Belvedere di Tragara; no standalone English Wikipedia article exists. WebSearch (en.wikipedia.org) returned only the broader Capri and Via Camerelle articles, where the belvedere is mentioned in passing — no dedicated page for this street or viewpoint.
